creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 180545
patch to update graphics/openjump from 1.9.1 to 1.10

Version 1.10 release rev.5336 (released on 27. January 2017) brings many bugfixes and several new features and improvements.

All is described in detail at https://sourceforge.net/projects/jump-pilot/files/OpenJUMP/1.10/

The minimal java compiler switched to 1.7.



Tested on Poudriere with HEADa+i, 110a+i and 103a+i.

Also, 'portlint -AC' seems happy.
